## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation change
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] test: Test addition or update
- [ ] chore: Build or tooling change

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
